creator: tjs@cdpa.nsysu.edu.tw
text:
This PR looks fine to me. Please commit it. Thanks!

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of dns/p5-POE-Component-Server-DNS,
>
> Please note that PR ports/115497 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/115497
>
>
